description: Safe local coding-agent workflow built on context indexing, symbol indexing, patch planning, model patch specs, diff generation, safe apply and test reports.

primary_commands.name: plan
primary_commands.description: Create planning artifacts without model calls or file writes.

primary_commands.name: generate_patch_spec
primary_commands.description: Call a configured model API to produce patch_spec_v1 JSON.

primary_commands.name: validate_patch_spec
primary_commands.description: Validate patch_spec_v1 before diff generation or apply.

primary_commands.name: review_diff
primary_commands.description: Generate a reviewable unified diff without editing source files.

primary_commands.name: apply_after_review
primary_commands.description: Apply patch spec only through dry-run or explicit confirmation.

primary_commands.name: test_after_apply
primary_commands.description: Run or dry-run allowed tests from a patch plan.
